title: VETERAN HOUSING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION VETERAN HOUSING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to veterans and their families to achieve housing stability. 364 9th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Head of household or spouse served in the military. Household income not exceeding 50% of area median income. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Identification -Proof of income -Proof of service -DD214 -Completed application with Clatsop Community Action -VA release LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 9th and Duane Streets, two blocks south of the transit center Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MOBILE PRODUCE PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HILLTOP FAMILY HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING VOUCHERS MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL CARE PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWER CART UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION
